body_txt: Many times when a measurement is given, the units of measurement don't make sense for what is being measured. This is especially annoying when the character suffering from Unit Confusion is supposed to be a scientific genius. This occurs frequently in Science Fiction . Compare Sci-Fi Writers Have No Sense of Scale . It also tends to happen in lazy localizations that blindly substitute one unit for another of the same type. Averted when the writers use Fantastic Measurement System , as the writers can redefine units whenever they like. If they care to keep it in mind.                Murena: Why not? 80 degrees... is a fever.
